title: Grant Zimmerman
compiled_truth: Grant Zimmerman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-12 to 2002-06-25), Grant Zimmerman sent 3 and received 64 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (2), [Jean Mrha](people/jean-mrha) (1), [Scott Healy](people/scott-healy) (1), [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (1), [Clement Lau](people/clement-lau) (1).
